title: A message from the President
message: Although the FSP receives support from a number of vendors and organizations, the cost of providing the bi-annual Security Seminar event continues to increase year-to-year. We have, and continue, to find ways to keep costs down, yet still deliver informative and educational semianrs. As a result, printed handouts will no longer be provided; it is the Committee's intent, as in the past, to post all [a href="presentation.html"]presentation materials[/a] on the FSP website one week after the event. Attendees and members will be able to download the material, as desired. Please supply yourself with paper and pens if you wish to take notes during the seminar.
